assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed

The summary (line 5) states: 'Project Configuration is up to date — no changes needed.' Line 22 states: 'None. All existing configuration entries were preserved without modification.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 9 (lines 86-93) shows the skill detected Security Configuration exists and is fully populated with no placeholder markers, resulting in 'Security Configuration is up to date.' The changes-log.md confirms 'No changes' for Security Configuration. There is no mention of any opt-in prompt being offered anywhere in the logs — the skill skipped directly to reporting 'up to date' status.
